summary: Tested all 7 reported issues (Issues 1-5, 7-8). All tests PASSED. Backend: Issue 3 barcode generation verified (SX10-char format). Frontend: Issue 1 (Create Trip modal), Issue 2 (action button colors), Issue 4 (tier labels), Issue 5 (loading dark theme), Issue 7 (auto-populate removed from worksheets), Issue 8 (payment history search) all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - hydration error potential. Low priority.

critical_code_review_comments: ParcelIntake.jsx has HTML structure issue - <span> wrapping <tr> in table body causes React hydration warning. Should use React.Fragment or clean array mapping.
seed_data_creation: Created test shipments with barcode during backend testing (description prefix: TEST_Issue3_Barcode, TEST_Barcode_Format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 issues verified and passing. Backend auth uses cookies (not Bearer tokens). Navigation via sidebar links works correctly. Invoices tab has auto-populate dropdown, Trip Worksheets does not. Team page shows Tier 1-5 labels in dropdown and badges. Loading page has dark theme (#3C3F42) with gold active tab (#E8DC88).

test_results_by_issue.Issue 1 - Create Trip Button: PASS - Modal opens with Route Destinations, Vehicle, Driver, Notes fields and Create Trip & Select button
test_results_by_issue.Issue 2 - Action Buttons: PASS - Save All & Print (green bg-green-600), Save All Only (blue bg-blue-600), Clear All (red bg-red-600) in header area
test_results_by_issue.Issue 3 - Manual Barcode: PASS - POST /api/shipments returns barcode field starting with SX (10 chars total). Verified via pytest.
test_results_by_issue.Issue 4 - Tier Rename: PASS - Team page shows Tier 1-5 labels (Tier 1 Admin, Tier 2 Manager, etc.) in dropdown and badges
test_results_by_issue.Issue 5 - Loading Dark Theme: PASS - TabsList has dark background rgb(60,63,66), active tab has gold rgb(232,220,136)
test_results_by_issue.Issue 7 - Auto-populate Moved: PASS - NOT present in Trip Worksheets tab, present in Invoices tab as dropdown
test_results_by_issue.Issue 8 - Payment History Search: PASS - Search input with correct placeholder, trip filter with All Trips option
